qa_pairs.question: What are the available molecular dynamics (MD) executables when using Amber 20 modules for CPU-only and GPU simulations?
qa_pairs.answer: For CPU-only simulations, Amber 20 modules provide `pmemd` (serial) and `pmemd.MPI` (parallel). For GPU-accelerated simulations, they offer `pmemd.cuda` (single GPU) and `pmemd.cuda.MPI` (multi-GPU).

qa_pairs.question: Are there any known issues regarding the `MMPBSA.py` program with specific Amber 20 or Amber 18 modules?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the `amber/20.12-20.15` module lacks the `MMPBSA.py.MPI` executable. Furthermore, `MMPBSA.py` from `amber/18-10-18.11` and `amber/18.14-18.17` modules cannot perform PB (Poisson-Boltzmann) calculations; for such calculations, it is advised to use more recent `amber/20` modules.
